description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, prepare a tabular dataset for an external Machine Learning model using the loaded Landsat multi-spectral GeoTIFF (band_1=SWIR, band_2=NIR, band_3=Red, band_4=Green). Create a virtual band named 'simple_ratio' calculated as the ratio of NIR to Red (band_2 / band_3). Create a 300x300 spatial subset of the product using pixel coordinates X=0 to 299 and Y=0 to 299. Export the pixel data for this subset, including all original bands and the new 'simple_ratio' band, to ~/snap_exports/ml_training_data.csv in CSV format.
